comment: NFR-QUAL-001 mid-tone compound regression guard. The compound-clip-inner-transform fixture uses pure red bgra [0,0,255,255], a fixed point of the sRGB/Rec.709 transfer functions, so a transfer-space confusion in the compound linear-passthrough branch is invisible there (measured: that fixture still passes with maxDeltaE=0.000 when sourceIsLinearWorking is dropped). This fixture routes mid-tone bgra [32,64,128,255] (display red ~0.502 -> linear ~0.214, double-decoded ~0.038) through one compound level so the nested render's linear-working texture actually discriminates. Measured wrong-implementation deltas against this reference: maxDeltaE=24.795 when sourceIsLinearWorking is dropped (outer composite re-decodes the already-linear nested texture) and maxDeltaE=23.864 when the nested level presents display-encoded color while the outer pass still skips the decode. Tolerance 10 is >=2x the measured cross-machine decode-path noise floor (maxDeltaE ~4.6 on CI runners vs 0.000 locally) and the weakest wrong-variant signal (23.864) is >=2x the tolerance.
